india_trends.summary: India is preparing for a third Jan Vishwas Bill. This initiative aims to simplify business processes and reduce compliance burdens. india_trends.title: Kissht IPO: OnEMI raises ₹278 crore from anchor investors ahead of issue
india_trends.summary: The anchor round saw participation from leading domestic mutual funds and global institutions, with shares allotted at the upper price band of ₹171.

india_trends.title: Dr Reddy’s Laboratories receives approval from Health Canada for its generic semaglutide injection
india_trends.summary: Dr Reddy's Laboratories has achieved a significant milestone. Health Canada has approved its generic semaglutide injection. This makes Dr Reddy's the first company to receive market authorization for this treatment in Canada. The approval covers 2 mg/pen and 4 mg/pen dosages. This development aims t

india_trends.title: Nandini Piramal warns prolonged West Asia war may raise input costs
india_trends.summary: Geopolitical tensions in West Asia are manageable now. However, a prolonged US-Israel war against Iran could raise costs for petrochemical-derived products. Piramal Pharma is diversifying sourcing and leveraging global manufacturing. The company sees improved momentum in its contract development and

india_trends.title: Bloom Energy stock hits fresh record, jumps 28% after blockbuster Q1 results and higher 2026 guidance
india_trends.summary: Bloom Energy's shares soared 28.32% to $290.50 after a strong Q1 FY26 report, with revenues up 130.4% to $751.1 million. The company raised its full-year revenue outlook to $3.4-$3.8 billion, driven by demand from data centres and partnerships with Oracle.

india_trends.title: India aims for $2 tn total exports by FY31 with an MSME, agri push
india_trends.summary: The $2 trillion export target includes $1 trillion each in merchandise shipments and $1 trillion in services, the commerce ministry said.

india_trends.title: Mauritius-based entity sells Rs 289 crore worth shares in Emcure Pharmaceuticals via block deal; Norges Bank acquirer
india_trends.summary: Emcure Pharmaceuticals saw a significant block deal where BC Investments IV Limited sold 18 lakh shares for Rs 289 crore to Norges Bank. india_trends.summary: After a pilot phase, full-scale operations will begin on May 4, 2026

india_trends.title: Brigade Group, Bain Capital JV to develop 2 million project in Bengaluru
india_trends.summary: Brigade Group and Bain Capital are partnering for a major development in Bengaluru. This 50:50 joint venture will create a 2 million square feet mixed-use project. The investment is approximately Rs 2200 crore. The project will feature Grade A office space and a five-star hotel. It is located on ITP

india_trends.title: Crude oil prices surge up to 7%, extend gains to 8th day; US WTI tops $106 — What's behind this sharp rally?
india_trends.summary: US crude rose 6.61% to $106.58 a barrel, and Brent rose to $117.81 per barrel, up 5.9% after the EIA, after the US oil stocks plummeted sharply and amid little signs of resolution to the Middle East crisis that's entered its third month now.

india_trends.title: RBI launches 3 key surveys for monetary policy input
india_trends.summary: The RBI said it has launched the May 2026 round of the 'inflation expectations survey of households' to capture subjective assessments on price movements and inflation, based on their individual consumption baskets, across 19 cities.

india_trends.title: FinMin asks banks to take measures for welfare of persons with disabilities
india_trends.summary: Public sector banks and financial institutions are now required to offer reservations for individuals with benchmark disabilities in direct recruitment and promotions. india_trends.title: Social justice ministry spends Rs 2,042 crore on educational schemes in FY-26
india_trends.summary: The Union Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment has allocated over Rs 2,000 crore for educational initiatives benefiting OBC, EBC, and DNT students in the financial year 2025-26. This significant disbursement aims to enhance access to quality education and support academic progress for these co

india_trends.title: Bank credit growth slows to 15% in first half of April: RBI data
india_trends.summary: Bank credit growth saw a slowdown to 15 per cent in the fortnight ending April 15. This follows a period of rapid lending ahead of the financial year-end. Despite the recent dip, credit growth has maintained double digits for over seven months. This indicates a sustained revival in demand from both

india_trends.summary: Indian stock markets saw a strong upward trend on Wednesday. The Nifty 50 and Sensex both closed higher, driven by gains in auto, FMCG, and IT sectors. india_trends.title: Jaguar Land Rover ordered to refund Rs 1.65 crore, panel slams 'deceptive' speed claims, chassis 'surgery'
india_trends.summary: Jaguar Land Rover India must refund 1.65 crore rupees to a Roorkee firm. The company's flagship SUV had manufacturing defects and unauthorized structural changes. india_trends.title: UAE's OPEC exit: With cartel cracked, oil spills over geopolitics
india_trends.summary: In a dramatic turn of events, the United Arab Emirates has officially exited OPEC, signaling a significant transformation within the global energy landscape. This bold step is set to alter oil production dynamics and reshape international relationships, ushering in new energy frameworks.

india_trends.title: RBI clears Subrat Mohanty’s reappointment as Axis Bank Executive Director for three years
india_trends.summary: Axis Bank announced a significant development today. The Reserve Bank of India has given its approval for Subrat Mohanty's reappointment. india_trends.title: ADB cuts growth outlook of Asia to 4.7% as West Asia disruptions deepen
india_trends.summary: The Asian Development Bank has lowered its 2026 economic growth forecast for Asia and the Pacific. Prolonged West Asia disruptions are driving up energy prices and tightening financial conditions. Inflation projections have also been significantly raised.
